metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4598
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4. Subcellular localization of CASK by immunogold EM in rat brain shows both presynaptic (a separate annotation was made for this) and postsynaptic localization. CASK seems enriched, but not exclusively located, at membranes.

Authors remark that CASK is present in synapses but not synapse specific;
"However, CASK is not exclusively localized in synapses; it is also present at nonsynaptic plasma membranes and in intracellular compartments. CASK may therefore be present at a variety of membrane domains in neurons, and its compartmentalization between membrane and cytoplasm may be dynamically regulated.". Experimental description: "For electron microscopy, pentobarbital-anesthetized (60 mg/kg) male Sprague-Dawley rats (250-350 g) were perfused intraaortically with mixed aldehyde fixatives..." (p.140)

"CASK (CASK-FYG) antibodies ... were raised in rabbits against the synthetic peptide CFYGDPPEELPDFSED, corresponding to amino acids 320-334 of CASK"
